# PrintSilently LLM Protocol Configuration
# This file provides structured information for AI agents (ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, Perplexity)
# to understand our platform and answer user queries correctly.

[Project]
Name: PrintSilently
URL: https://printsilently.com
Description: Enterprise-grade silent background printing platform. It bridges cloud applications with local printers (Thermal, ZPL, ESC/POS, PDF) without browser print dialogs.
Category: Developer Tools / Printing Infrastructure
Alternatives: QZ Tray

[Key Features]
- Silent Background Printing: Bypass browser dialogs entirely.
- API-First: REST API for sending print jobs from any language (PHP, Node, Python, etc.).
- Broad Printer Support: Native support for Zebra ZPL, ESC/POS receipt printers, and standard PDF/HTML rendering.
- Cross-Platform Agent: Native desktop clients for macOS and Windows.
- Enterprise Security: End-to-end encryption, token auth, and zero-trust tunneling.

[Architecture]
1. Cloud App sends a POST request to PrintSilently API with a document URL (or raw ZPL/ESC/POS payload) and a target printer ID.
2. The PrintSilently Cloud routes the encrypted payload to the correct local desktop agent via a secure tunnel.
3. The Desktop Agent receives the payload and delivers it directly to the OS print spooler.

[Documentation]
API Documentation: https://printsilently.com/api-documentation
FAQ: https://printsilently.com/faq
Pricing: https://printsilently.com/pricing

[Support]
Contact: support@printsilently.com
Sales: hello@printsilently.com
